parts.text: "You are a senior hedge fund analyst. The stock ticker {{2.data.`Global Quote`.`01. symbol`}} had a massive trading day today. It moved {{2.data.`Global Quote`.`10. change percent`}}% and closed at a price of ${{2.data.`Global Quote`.`05. price`}}. Write a concise, 3-bullet-point summary explaining what might be driving this movement, and conclude with a market sentiment score from 1 to 10."
